title: Productivity Dashboard
description: A modern productivity dashboard that helps users manage daily tasks, organize workflow, and track productivity in a clean UI.

title: Weather App
description: A  weather application that displays real-time weather information of different cities with a simple and user-friendly interface.

title: React Image Gallery
description: A  image gallery built using React and Tailwind CSS with modern UI layout and image filter effects like grayscale and blur.

title: Virtual Piano
description: An interactive virtual piano built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Play piano notes using your keyboard!
